prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-2IESCKCLB-ES-LGHTBL Product Type: CARABINER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 2 Inch Extra Small Carabiner Key Chain - Light Blue Description: Clip, carry, and organize with ease. The ASR Outdoor Extra Small Carabiner is the perfect solution for keeping your essential gear within arm’s reach. Whether you’re heading outdoors or just managing your everyday carry, this compact, lightweight carabiner adds convenience without bulk.

Constructed from durable aluminum and finished in a sleek light blue anodized coating, it’s designed to handle your on-the-go lifestyle - no matter where the day takes you.

Please Note: This carabiner is not designed for climbing. Search Terms: extra small carabiner keychain, 2 inch aluminum carabiner clip, light blue key ring, mini gear clip for keys backpack purse, EDC key holder, non-climbing carabiner, camping hiking accessories, ASR Outdoor carabiner Features: - ULTRA COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT - At just 2 inches long, it’s the perfect size for keychains, zipper pulls, or quick-access gear clips. - EVERDAY CARRY ESSENTIAL - Easily attaches to backpacks, belt loops, purses, gym bags, and more for streamlined organization. - WEATHER-RESISTANT FINISH - Anodized aluminum resists rust and corrosion for long-term outdoor or indoor use. - INTEGRATED SPLIT KEY RING - Comes ready to use - no need for extra hardware or tools to attach your items. - BRIGHT, EASY TO SPOT COLOR - The light blue finish stands out, making your keys or gear easy to find in any environment. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2 Inch Extra Small Light Blue Carabiner
